rows.statement: theorem psd_fromBlocks_zero_iff {m n : Type*} [Fintype m] [Fintype n] [DecidableEq m] [DecidableEq n] (A : Matrix m m ℝ) (D : Matrix n n ℝ) : (Matrix.fromBlocks A 0 0 D).PosSemidef ↔ A.PosSemidef ∧ D.PosSemidef
